attributes.action: Reduce VAT for the UK Hospitality Industry to Support Pubs, Cafés & Restaurants
attributes.additional_details:
Reducing VAT on hospitality to 12.5% or lower, similar to the temporary rate introduced during the pandemic, would help businesses remain sustainable, keep prices affordable for customers & protect thousands of jobs across the UK.

Hospitality is a vital part of local communities and the UK economy. Without action, many businesses risk closure leading to job losses & empty high streets.

We urge the Government to reduce VAT for hospitality businesses to support the sector & safeguard its future.
attributes.background: Reduce VAT for the hospitality industry to help pubs, restaurants, cafés & hotels survive rising costs & protect jobs. The hospitality sector is facing unprecedented financial pressure from increased energy costs, supplier prices, staffing costs & taxation. Many are struggling to remain viable.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Cut VAT for local hospitality – for Pubs, Cafes & Restaurants
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/743021
